title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim built Paraform, a hiring platform that empowers human recruiters rather than automating them away, achieving 10x revenue growth and $65M funding. The company has paid out over $50 million to human recruiters while working with clients like Palantir and Rippling, demonstrating that humans are the moat in recruitment.
